description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard storage box with a light brown color and a matte finish. The box features a visible seam of packing tape running along the top, suggesting it is sealed for storage or transport. On one side, there are two upward-pointing black arrows, commonly used to indicate the correct upright orientation for handling. The surface appears slightly textured, typical of corrugated cardboard, and there are no visible handles or locking mechanisms. The box is unadorned except for the arrows, with no additional labels or signage. Its design is utilitarian, suitable for use in garages, warehouses, or for moving and storing items in urban environments.
description: A light brown cardboard storage box with a taped top seam and black upward arrows on one side. The box is plain, sturdy, and designed for general storage or moving purposes.
description_view_0: The front view shows a plain brown surface with two black upward arrows in the lower right corner, indicating the upright orientation.
description_view_1: This view highlights the top seam of brown packing tape running down the center, with no visible markings or arrows.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side also shows a plain brown surface with the black upward arrows visible, but from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: This view again emphasizes the taped seam on top, with no visible arrows or additional markings.
